description: JSON-only dashboard output mode with hosted renderer
key_changes: Added TOPN(50) requirement to DAX GUIDELINES
Changed GENERATING DASHBOARDS section: output TWO JSON objects (DASH_CONFIG + DATA) instead of complete HTML
Added metric syntax reference (sum:field, ratio:a:b, wavg:sum:count, static:key)
Changed OUTPUT RULES: dashboards output ONLY JSON, user pastes into renderer

features: Paste from Copilot button (parses combined JSON)
Full dashboard.html template embedded as string
Pre-populated with sample data, auto-renders on load

proof_of_concept.test: A4 TOPN(20) query already proves JSON-only works
proof_of_concept.notes: Agent produced exact dim/facts structure. DASH_CONFIG would need to be requested separately in a follow-up message (agent offered this: 'prepare a dashboard-ready JSON with KPIs and charts?').

workflow: User: 'Generate a live dashboard for SLA performance'
Agent: calls search_schema to discover SLA measures
Agent: calls execute_dax with TOPN(50) to get company x month data
Agent: outputs DASH_CONFIG JSON + DATA JSON
User: pastes DASH_CONFIG into first textarea, DATA into second
User: clicks 'Render Dashboard' or presses Ctrl+Enter
Renderer: builds full HTML dashboard with KPIs, gauges, charts, table
User: optionally clicks 'Download HTML' for standalone file
